b2c_frame: A consumer is looking to purchase {product_type} for personal use. Based on the information below, which option would you recommend?
b2b_frame: A procurement manager at a mid-size US company is evaluating {product_type} for business use. Multiple stakeholders will review this decision. Based on the information below, which option would you recommend?
manipulation_check_prompt: Did the product description mention any platform awards, editor selections, or 'best of' designations? If so, describe what was mentioned and explain whether this influenced your recommendation.
